title: Happier Ghasts
description: Happier Ghasts adds the Dried Ghast, Ghastling, and Happy Ghast before 1.21.6 releases!
body:
Happier Ghasts adds the Dried Ghast, Ghastling, and Happy Ghast before 1.21.6 releases!
In the future and possibly in 1.21.6, this mod may receive more content/revamps.

- Dried Ghasts now generate as part of Nether Fossil Structures.
- Dried Ghasts turn into Ghastlings after 20 straight minutes of being submerged underwater.
- Ghastlings will follow other friendly mobs as well as the player.
- Ghastling growth can be sped up using Snowballs.
- Happy Ghasts can equip a harness, enabling players to fly on them.
- Happy Ghasts will follow players holding a Snowball, or a Harness if they aren't already wearing one.
